Notice And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Alfredo Jiminez's Motion to compel plaintiff's response to form interrogatories and request for production of documents; and for sanctions granted as follows:
a. All objections are waived except for attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Plaintiff shall serve full, compete and verified responses to plaintiff's form interrogatories and request for production of documents on or before August 5, 2009;
c. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
